sections.text: 12+Years ofExcellence Our Story We Invite You to VisitOur Food Restaurant Founded in 2012, Sarab began as a small corner joint with a big dream - to serve food that brings people together. Today we're proud to serve thousands of happy customers every week with the same passion that started it all. 100% Fresh Ingredients We source locally and sustainably.
